Upgrade for more
Sign Up
for more
By proceeding, you agree to our
Terms of Use
.
Advanced settings (optional)
Convert Any File
FreeConvert supports more than 1500 file conversions. You can convert videos, images, audio files, or e-books. There are tons of Advanced Options to fine-tune your conversions.
Works Anywhere
FreeConvert is an online file converter. So it works on Windows, Mac, Linux, or any mobile device. All major browsers are supported. Simply upload a file and select a target format.
Privacy Guaranteed
We know that file security and privacy are important to you. That is why we use 256-bit SSL encryption when transferring files and automatically delete them after a few hours.
Your Data, Our Priority
At FreeConvert, we go beyond just converting files—we protect them. Our robust security framework ensures that your data is always safe, whether you're converting an image, video, or document. With advanced encryption, secure data centers, and vigilant monitoring, we've covered every aspect of your data's safety.
Learn more about our commitment to security

Centers

Authentication

API
No Ads
Payments are secured with
Trusted and valued by some of the biggest brands
Your Data, Our Priority
At FreeConvert, we go beyond just converting files—we protect them. Our robust security framework ensures that your data is always safe, whether you're converting an image, video, or document. With advanced encryption, secure data centers, and vigilant monitoring, we've covered every aspect of your data's safety.
Learn more about our commitment to security
SSL/TLS
Encryption
Secured Data
Centers
Access Control and
Authentication
Frequently Asked Questions
What is a conversion minute?
Conversion minutes measure how long it takes to convert your files on our servers. Generally, photo and document conversions only take just one minute to convert. Large files or advanced codecs consume more conversion minutes. Your conversion minute usage is visible on your account dashboard. We only bill you for successful conversions.
Can I sign up for just one month?
Yes, you can sign up for a pro account just for one month. Simply cancel the subscription (from the account page) at any time so that it will not be renewed after the first month.
Can I top up conversion minutes?
You can top up credits by choosing the “Custom Plan” option.
Choose the payment frequency “One-time Credit"
.
Please note that unused credits expire 30 days after purchase.
Can I try FreeConvert.com for free?
Free users get 20 conversion minutes per day for both Web and API use. For most users, a conversion would only take a minute or less. This means up to 20 files per day can be converted for free. You do not need to create an account to get these benefits on our website. If you want to utilize these free minutes for API usage, you can sign-up for a free account
here
. Please note that there is a limit of 5 conversion minutes per file for free usage.
Are my payment details secure?
We use industry-leading payment providers Stripe and PayPal to process payments. Payment data is transferred through 128-bit secure HTTPS and is never saved on our servers.
How long does it take to activate?
Pro features will be added to your account instantly after the payment.
What if I am not happy with file quality?
If you have any trouble converting your files, our dedicated engineers would be more than happy to help you. Please send us an email using the
contact us
page.
What payment methods are available?
We currently accept Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Discover, Diners Club, JCB), PayPal, Google Pay, Apple Pay, Alipay, iDEAL, Sofort, GiroPay. More payment methods are available depending on your country.
Can I get a prorated discount when upgrading?
Yes. if you are using the same credit card for the upgrade/downgrade, the prorated amount is automatically calculated and applied. However, if you are upgrading or downgrading using a new credit card or PayPal, please proceed with the upgrade first and then contact
help@freeconvert.com
to get the prorated discount (in the form of a partial refund).
Are there any contracts, hidden charges or setup fees?
No! We believe in transparent billing. There are no contracts, hidden fees, or setup charges. You will see exactly how many conversion minutes (credits) you use for each of your tasks. If any task fails for any reason, we automatically refund the conversion minutes used for it.
Report a Bug

Improved Navigation & SEO
— Enjoy better site navigation with updated sitemap entries, tool menus, search enhancements, and language translations for all PDF tools.
Performance Upgrades

General bug fixes and improvements
July 30, 2023
Made improvements to file processing workflow.
Improved our
JPG to PDF
conversion tool.
Improved the file table's target selector dropdown.
Improved Tooltip Misalignment in
Android Audio Converter
        Page.
Improved Download all for multiple files conversion.
July 25th, 2022
- Released an
Image to PDF
conversion tool
- Released German translation. Hallo!
- Improved
AVIF to JPG
conversions
- Improved
DOC to JPG
and
DOCX to JPG
conversions
- Improved
API documentation
- Improved file uploads
May 19th, 2022
- Released a feature to save Advanced Options as a preset!
- Improved team usage graph
- Numerous bug fixes and improvements
March 1st, 2022
- Added more conversion capacity
- Improved
video compressor
- Improved
PNG to SVG
- Introduced
HTML to PDF
and
Webpage to PDF
conversions
- Improved
CBR to PDF
, and
CBZ to PDF
January 20th, 2022
- We have a brand new look a
fter 4 years of operations
! Our main priority was to improve mobile usability and user experience. We hope you like it as much as we do.
- Released a QR code feature to download converted files directly on your mobile devices!
- Improved our
File Conversion API
now supports import and export from S3, Azure, Google Cloud, and SFTP.
- Improved our
HTML to PDF
conversion quality (it can now automatically hide cookies and l

analysis.name: FreeConvert
analysis.tagline: File Converter — Easily convert files from one format to another, online.
analysis.value_proposition: Browser-based file conversion and compression platform supporting 1500+ formats across video, audio, image, document, PDF, and archive files, with a free tier and paid plans for higher volume and larger files.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individuals and small teams who need occasional-to-frequent file format conversion without installing software, plus developers needing a conversion API.

features.name: video converter
features.description: Convert video files between formats including MP4, MOV, WEBM, AVI, and more
features.evidence_quote: FreeConvert supports more than 1500 file conversions. You can convert videos, images, audio files, or e-books.

features.name: audio converter
features.description: Convert audio files between formats including MP3, WAV, OGG, and more
features.evidence_quote: FreeConvert supports more than 1500 file conversions. You can convert videos, images, audio files, or e-books.

features.name: mp3 converter
features.description: Dedicated MP3 conversion tool
features.evidence_quote: MP3 Converter

features.name: image converter
features.description: Convert image files between formats including JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, SVG, JFIF, and more
features.evidence_quote: FreeConvert supports more than 1500 file conversions. You can convert videos, images, audio files, or e-books.

features.name: pdf converter
features.description: Convert to and from PDF including PDF to Word, PDF to JPG, DOCX to PDF, JPG to PDF
features.evidence_quote: PDF Converter

features.name: document converter
features.description: Convert document formats including DOCX, HTML, and others
features.evidence_quote: Document Converter

features.name: ebook converter
features.description: Convert ebook formats including EPUB, MOBI, and PDF
features.evidence_quote: EPUB to PDF, PDF to EPUB, EPUB to MOBI

features.name: archive converter
features.description: Convert archive formats such as RAR to ZIP
features.evidence_quote: Archive Converter, RAR to Zip

features.name: unit converter
features.description: Convert units of measurement (lbs to kg, feet to meters, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Unit Converter, Lbs to Kg, Kg to Lbs, Feet to Meters

features.name: time zone converter
features.description: Convert times between time zones (PST to EST, CST to EST, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Time Converter, PST to EST, CST to EST

features.name: gif maker
features.description: Create animated GIFs from videos, images, MP4, WEBM, APNG, MOV, AVI
features.evidence_quote: Video to GIF, MP4 to GIF, WEBM to GIF, APNG to GIF, Image to GIF, MOV to GIF, AVI to GIF

features.name: gif to video
features.description: Convert GIF files to video formats such as MP4 and APNG
features.evidence_quote: GIF to MP4, GIF to APNG

features.name: video compressor
features.description: Compress video files to reduce file size
features.evidence_quote: Video Compressor

features.name: mp3 compressor
features.description: Compress MP3 audio files
features.evidence_quote: MP3 Compressor

features.name: wav compressor
features.description: Compress WAV audio files
features.evidence_quote: WAV Compressor

features.name: image compressor
features.description: Compress image files including JPEG and PNG
features.evidence_quote: Image Compressor, JPEG Compressor, PNG Compressor

features.name: pdf compressor
features.description: Compress PDF files with advanced compression options
features.evidence_quote: Compress PDF — Take control of your file size with advanced compression options now available

features.name: gif compressor
features.description: Compress animated GIF files
features.evidence_quote: GIF Compressor

features.name: crop video
features.description: Crop the dimensions of a video file online
features.evidence_quote: Crop Video

features.name: trim video
features.description: Trim/cut video files to a specified duration
features.evidence_quote: Trim Video

features.name: resize image
features.description: Resize image files to custom dimensions
features.evidence_quote: Resize Image

features.name: crop image
features.description: Crop images to a specified region online
features.evidence_quote: Crop Image

features.name: rotate image
features.description: Rotate image files online
features.evidence_quote: Rotate Image

features.name: flip image
features.description: Flip images horizontally or vertically
features.evidence_quote: Flip Image

features.name: image enlarger
features.description: Enlarge images beyond their original resolution
features.evidence_quote: Image Enlarger

features.name: color picker
features.description: Online color picker tool
features.evidence_quote: Color Picker

features.name: collage maker
features.description: Create photo collages online and via mobile apps (iOS and Android)
features.evidence_quote: Collage Maker, Collage Maker Android, Collage Maker iOS

features.name: pdf merge
features.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document
features.evidence_quote: PDF Merge — Combine multiple PDFs into one with ease! Check out our improved PDF Merge tool

features.name: pdf split
features.description: Separate a PDF into individual pages or custom page ranges
features.evidence_quote: PDF Split — Easily separate large PDFs into individual pages or custom ranges

features.name: flatten pdf
features.description: Flatten PDF forms and annotations for compatibility and to prevent further edits
features.evidence_quote: Flatten PDF — Finalize your forms and annotations with our brand-new Flatten PDF tool.

features.name: resize pdf
features.description: Adjust PDF page dimensions
features.evidence_quote: Resize PDF Files: Improved the Resize PDF tool with a new and optimized frontend experience

features.name: unlock pdf
features.description: Remove password protection from PDF files
features.evidence_quote: Unlock PDF — Say goodbye to restrictions! Easily remove password protection

features.name: rotate pdf
features.description: Rotate PDF pages to fix sideways or upside-down pages
features.evidence_quote: Rotate PDF — Instantly fix sideways pages with our user-friendly Rotate PDF tool.

features.name: protect pdf
features.description: Add password protection to PDF files to prevent unauthorized access
features.evidence_quote: Password Protect PDF: Launched a new feature to secure your PDFs with a password

features.name: crop pdf
features.description: Crop PDF page margins and dimensions
features.evidence_quote: Introduced Crop PDF tool.

features.name: organize pdf
features.description: Rearrange and reorganize pages within a PDF document
features.evidence_quote: Introduced Rearrange PDF tool.

features.name: extract images from pdf
features.description: Extract high-quality embedded images from PDF documents
features.evidence_quote: Extract Images from PDF — Quickly extract high-quality images using the new Extract Images from PDF tool.

features.name: pdf page remover
features.description: Delete specific pages from a PDF file
features.evidence_quote: Remove Pages from PDF: Introduced the PDF Page Remover tool that lets you easily delete specific pages

features.name: extract pages from pdf
features.description: Extract selected pages from any PDF document
features.evidence_quote: Extract Pages from PDF: Added a powerful tool to extract selected pages from any PDF document

features.name: cloud upload — dropbox
features.description: Upload files directly from Dropbox for conversion
features.evidence_quote: From Dropbox

features.name: cloud upload — google drive
features.description: Upload files directly from Google Drive for conversion
features.evidence_quote: From Google Drive

features.name: cloud upload — onedrive
features.description: Upload files directly from OneDrive for conversion
features.evidence_quote: From OneDrive

features.name: upload from url
features.description: Upload files from a remote URL for conversion
features.evidence_quote: Improved the Upload From URL option on FreeConvert.

features.name: advanced conversion settings
features.description: Fine-tune conversion output with advanced options per format
features.evidence_quote: There are tons of Advanced Options to fine-tune your conversions.

features.name: batch conversion
features.description: Convert up to 100 files simultaneously in a single job
features.evidence_quote: 100 conversions at a time

features.name: batch pdf merge
features.description: Merge up to 100 PDF files at once
features.evidence_quote: Merge 100 files at a time

features.name: gpu-accelerated video encoding
features.description: GPU/CPU-based video encoding for H.264, H.265, and AV1 codecs for faster processing
features.evidence_quote: Introduced GPU H.264, H.265, AV1 to our Video Converter and Video Compress tools.

features.name: high-priority conversion queue
features.description: Skip the queue with elevated CPU/GPU priority processing on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: High priority CPU - based video encoding / Highest priority GPU/CPU - based video encoding

features.name: no-ads experience
features.description: Ad-free conversion experience on all paid plans
features.evidence_quote: No Ads

features.name: conversion minutes dashboard
features.description: Account dashboard showing conversion minute usage and billing
features.evidence_quote: Your conversion minute usage is visible on your account dashboard.

features.name: one-time credit top-up
features.description: Purchase additional conversion minutes as a one-time credit (expires 30 days)
features.evidence_quote: You can top up credits by choosing the 'Custom Plan' option... unused credits expire 30 days after purchase.

features.name: file conversion api
features.description: REST API for programmatic file conversion across all supported formats
features.evidence_quote: File Conversion API, Image Conversion API, Audio Conversion API, Document Conversion API

features.name: video conversion api
features.description: API endpoints for video format conversion including MP4
features.evidence_quote: Video Conversion API, MP4 Conversion API

features.name: pdf conversion api
features.description: API for converting to/from PDF including JPG to PDF, PDF to JPG, PDF to Word, Word to PDF
features.evidence_quote: PDF Conversion API, JPG to PDF API, PDF to JPG API, PDF to WORD API, WORD to PDF API

features.name: html to pdf api
features.description: API to convert HTML pages to PDF documents
features.evidence_quote: HTML to PDF API

features.name: website screenshot api
features.description: API to capture screenshots of websites
features.evidence_quote: Website Screenshot API

features.name: video compression api
features.description: API for compressing video files programmatically
features.evidence_quote: Video Compression API

features.name: pdf compression api
features.description: API for compressing PDF files programmatically
features.evidence_quote: Compress PDF API

features.name: image compression api
features.description: API for compressing image files programmatically
features.evidence_quote: Image Compression API

features.name: api job builder
features.description: Visual/guided tool to construct API conversion jobs without writing raw API calls
features.evidence_quote: API Job Builder

features.name: api keys management
features.description: Generate and manage API keys from account dashboard
features.evidence_quote: API Keys

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Webhook support for receiving conversion job completion callbacks
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks

features.name: team dashboard
features.description: Team management page for shared account access and activity visibility
features.evidence_quote: Improved Team Page Dashboard on our site.

features.name: invoice management
features.description: View and download billing invoices from the account panel
features.evidence_quote: Invoice

features.name: activity log
features.description: Account-level log of conversion activity and jobs
features.evidence_quote: Activity

features.name: notifications
features.description: In-app notifications for conversion job status
features.evidence_quote: Notifications

features.name: mobile app — image converter (android/ios)
features.description: Native mobile apps for image conversion on Android and iOS
features.evidence_quote: Image Converter Android, Image Converter iOS

features.name: mobile app — collage maker (android/ios)
features.description: Native mobile apps for collage creation on Android and iOS
features.evidence_quote: Collage Maker Android, Collage Maker iOS

features.name: 256-bit ssl encryption
features.description: SSL/TLS encryption for all file transfers
features.evidence_quote: we use 256-bit SSL encryption when transferring files

features.name: automatic file deletion
features.description: Uploaded and converted files are automatically deleted after a few hours
features.evidence_quote: automatically delete them after a few hours

features.name: secured data centers
features.description: Files stored in secure data centers with access control and vigilant monitoring
features.evidence_quote: Secured Data Centers, Access Control and Authentication

features.name: multi-language ui
features.description: Interface available in 14+ languages including English, German, Spanish, French, Japanese, Chinese, Korean
features.evidence_quote: English, Deutsch, Español, Français, Português, Italiano, Dutch, 日本語, 简体中文, 한국어, Svenska, Türkçe

features.name: ai to pdf converter
features.description: Convert Adobe Illustrator (AI) files to PDF
features.evidence_quote: Improved our AI to PDF Converter.

features.name: dng to jpg converter
features.description: Convert DNG raw camera files to JPG
features.evidence_quote: Improved our DNG to JPG Converter.

features.name: raf to jpg converter
features.description: Convert RAF (Fujifilm raw) files to JPG
features.evidence_quote: Improved our RAF to JPG Converter.

features.name: docx to html converter
features.description: Convert Word documents to HTML
features.evidence_quote: Improved our DOCX to HTML Converter.

features.name: pdf to html converter
features.description: Convert PDF documents to HTML
features.evidence_quote: Improved our PDF to HTML Converter.

features.name: heic to jpg converter
features.description: Convert Apple HEIC/HEIF image files to JPG
features.evidence_quote: Improved HEIC to JPG converter tool.

features.name: apng to gif converter
features.description: Convert Animated PNG files to GIF
features.evidence_quote: Improved our APNG to GIF Converter tool.

features.name: no account required (web)
features.description: Use web conversion tools without signing up; free tier auto-applies
features.evidence_quote: You do not need to create an account to get these benefits on our website.

features.name: prorated plan upgrade/downgrade
features.description: Prorated billing adjustment when switching plans mid-cycle
features.evidence_quote: the prorated amount is automatically calculated and applied.

features.name: money-back guarantee
features.description: 100% money-back guarantee on all paid plans
features.evidence_quote: 100% Money Back Guarantee

differentiators: No software installation required — fully browser-based
Works on Windows, Mac, Linux, and mobile
GPU-accelerated video encoding (H.264, H.265, AV1) on Pro and Scale plans
Automatic file deletion after a few hours for privacy
Free tier with no account required for web use
API and web use both included in paid plans with same conversion minutes pool

recent_ships.what: Improved DNG to JPG converter, AI to PDF converter, Resize PDF tool; introduced MOV to GIF and AVI to GIF converters; improved Rotate PDF tool
Improved Merge PDF, Rotate PDF, Split PDF; improved DOCX to HTML converter
Introduced Crop PDF tool; improved PNG to PDF, Rotate PDF, RAF to JPG, PDF to HTML, Upload from URL, Video Trimmer, Video Compressor, Flatten PDF
PDF Page Remover, Password Protect PDF, Extract Pages from PDF, improved Resize PDF frontend
Unlock PDF, Rotate PDF, and Extract Images from PDF tools launched
Improved PDF Merge and Split with redesigned edit page; new Flatten PDF tool; advanced Compress PDF options; main menu redesign; GPU/CPU backend for PDF tools
Introduced GPU H.264, H.265, AV1 encoding for Video Converter and Video Compressor
Improved APNG to GIF, Video to GIF, HEIC to JPG, Online Video Converter; updated Team Page Dashboard; added security sections site-wide

free_tier.limits: 20 conversion minutes/day; 5 conversion minutes max per file; 1 GB max file size; no account needed for web; account required for API

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,500 conv mins/mo, unlimited ops/day, 1.5 GB max file, high-priority CPU encoding, no ads

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2,000 conv mins/mo, unlimited ops/day, 2 GB max file, highest-priority CPU encoding, no ads

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 4,000 conv mins/mo, unlimited ops/day, 5 GB max file, highest-priority GPU/CPU encoding, no ads

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 1M conv mins/mo, unlimited ops/day, up to 20 GB max file, GPU/CPU encoding — on-demand pricing

pricing.notes: Yearly billing saves ~2 months (approx 17% off). One-time top-up credits available via 'Custom Plan' option; unused credits expire 30 days after purchase. All paid plans include: 100 concurrent conversions, merge 100 files, web + API access, no ads. Scale plan is on-demand/custom pricing. Free users get 20 conversion minutes/day with no account required on web; API free use requires account signup.
